TABLE.NAME: confprogram
TABLE.COMMENT: Main table for Conference Program activity instances

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this activity belongs to

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity name

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description shown on course page

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Format of the intro field

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissionscmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course-module id of the mod_confsubmissions instance this program vets

FIELD.NAME: phase
FIELD.COMMENT: review or display

FIELD.NAME: blindreview
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether submitter/reviewer identities are hidden from each other during review

FIELD.NAME: groupreviewmode
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether reviewers are assigned as members of reviewer groups rather than individually

FIELD.NAME: defaultmaxreviews
FIELD.COMMENT: Default per-reviewer cap on assigned reviews in group-review mode; 0 means unlimited

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_assignment
TABLE.COMMENT: Reviewers (or reviewer groups) assigned to review a submission

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table; kept alongside submissionid so assignments can be queried/deleted per-instance without joining through mod_confsubmissions

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table

FIELD.NAME: reviewerid
FIELD.COMMENT: Set when this assignment is to an individual reviewer; null when reviewergroupid is set instead. Exactly one of the two is set per row, enforced in code

FIELD.NAME: reviewergroupid
FIELD.COMMENT: Set when this assignment is to a reviewer group; null when reviewerid is set instead. Exactly one of the two is set per row, enforced in code

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_review
TABLE.COMMENT: A completed rubric review by one reviewer of one submission, mirroring the core grading API instance so scores can be reported without re-querying it

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: cross-plugin reference

FIELD.NAME: reviewerid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to user table; the reviewer who filled this rubric

FIELD.NAME: round
FIELD.COMMENT: Matches confprogram_decision.round; a resubmission starts a fresh round of reviews

FIELD.NAME: gradinginstanceid
FIELD.COMMENT: The core grading API gradinginstanceid (grading_instances.id) this review's rubric fill-in lives in

FIELD.NAME: grade
FIELD.COMMENT: The numeric grade computed by the rubric, as returned by gradingform_instance::submit_and_get_grade(); null until submitted

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_reviewermax
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-reviewer override of the max-reviews cap used in group-review mode

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to user table

FIELD.NAME: maxreviews
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum reviews this reviewer may be assigned, overriding confprogram.defaultmaxreviews

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_decision
TABLE.COMMENT: The accept/reject/resubmit/waitlist call made on a submission

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table

FIELD.NAME: decision
FIELD.COMMENT: accept, reject, resubmit or waitlist

FIELD.NAME: round
FIELD.COMMENT: Increments each time a resubmit cycle completes

FIELD.NAME: decidedby
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to user table; the user who made this decision

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_favourite
TABLE.COMMENT: A user's favourited submission during the Display phase

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to user table; the user who favourited this submission

TABLE.NAME: confprogram_unvetted
TABLE.COMMENT: Marks a submission as exempt from review (e.g. panels, keynotes)

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: References mod_confsubmissions's confsubmissions_submission.id. Not a real foreign key: it is a cross-plugin reference into another activity's table

FIELD.NAME: setby
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to user table; the user who flagged this submission as unvetted

FIELD.NAME: confprogram
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confprogram table

FIELD.NAME: fieldname
FIELD.COMMENT: A field name sourced from mod_confsubmissions, e.g. title, abstract, track, speakers, or an optional fieldname such as language

FIELD.NAME: showinlist
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether this field is shown in the accepted-submissions list view

FIELD.NAME: showinmodal
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether this field is shown in the submission detail modal
